Description:
Solventless | Small Batch | Full-Spectrum Flavor

Discover the vibrant harmony of fruit and funk with our Peach Berries Cold Cure Rosin. Pressed from premium, fresh-frozen Peach Berries flower, this solventless extract is a showcase of craftsmanship and terpene-rich precision.

Expect a mouthwatering blend of ripe peach, wild berry, and creamy citrus on the nose, layered with subtle floral notes and a whisper of gas. The cold cure process locks in the full spectrum of cannabinoids and terpenes, delivering a smooth, flavorful dab and an experience that's both uplifting and relaxing—perfect for any time of day.
BrandName: Soma Rosa Live Rosin Peach Berries

ProductName: Soma Rosa Live Rosin 1g Hybrid Collin's Ave
Description:
Solventless Perfection | Small-Batch Craft | Strain-Specific Expression

Step into luxury with our Collins Ave Cold Cure Rosin, a solventless extract crafted for those who crave flavor, potency, and purity. Pressed from top-tier, fresh-frozen Collins Ave flower and cured at low temps to preserve delicate terpenes, this cold cure rosin delivers an elegant dab experience with unmatched smoothness.

Collins Ave is known for its unique terpene profile: a creamy, sweet dessert-like aroma layered with citrus zest, earthy vanilla, and a touch of OG gas. The cold cure process transforms this into a soft, buttery texture that's easy to work with and rich in both flavor and cannabinoids.

Description:
Solventless | Small Batch | Premium Grade

Dive into a flavor-forward experience with our Lemon Kush Mintz Cold Cure Rosin, a high-end, solventless extract crafted from the finest fresh-frozen flower. ProductName: Soma Rosa Live Rosin 1g Hybrid Honey Buns
Description:
Indulge in the luxurious experience of Honey Buns Cold Cure Rosin, a premium solventless concentrate that delivers a creamy, rich flavor profile with every dab. Expertly extracted using only the finest fresh-frozen cannabis and cold-cured to perfection, this rosin preserves the strain's full-spectrum potency and delicate terpenes for a flavorful, clean experience.
Honey Buns is an indulgent hybrid strain created from Gelatti x Honey B. The aroma bursts with sweet honey and vanilla notes, paired with soft herbal, nutty undertones and a subtle skunky finish. Every dab of this cold-cured rosin transports you into a dessert-like bliss with its smooth, bakery-inspired flavor profile.

ProductName: Soma Rosa Live Rosin 1g Sativa Sour Diesel
Description: Prepare for an unforgettable ride with our Sour Diesel Cold Cure Rosin, a pure and potent concentrate extracted without solvents to retain the full essence of this legendary strain. Known for its energizing and uplifting effects, Sour Diesel rosin delivers a perfect balance of cerebral stimulation and physical relaxation. The cold-cure method enhances the strain's naturally pungent, diesel-fuel aroma, preserving its iconic sharp citrus and earthy undertones in every dab.

Mendo Indoor Flower 3.5g Hybrid Purple OG
Description:
Purple OG is an indica-dominant hybrid bred from Triangle Kush × Josh D OG genetics, delivering deep gas-forward terps with rich layers of earth and dark fruit. The aroma is loud and pungent — heavy fuel, pine, and sweet grape layered over a classic kush funk. On the inhale, bold notes of diesel and earthy spice hit first, followed by a smooth grape and herbal finish that lingers on the palate. The effects settle in quickly with a calming head change and full-body relaxation, making it ideal for slowing things down without completely checking out. Grown by master cultivators in our state-of-the-art indoor facility.
Flavor: Diesel, grape, earthy pine, kush, herbal spice
Effects: Relaxing, euphoric, calming
Dominant Terpenes: Limonene, Linalool, Myrcene

ProductName: Mendo Indoor Flower 3.5g Indica Sour Animal Cookies
Description:
Sour Animal Cookies is a potent indica bred from Animal Cookies × Sour Diesel, combining loud fuel-heavy terps with creamy cookie funk. The aroma punches out of the jar instantly — sharp diesel, sour candy, earthy dough, and rich gas layered over a sweet herbal finish. On the inhale, bold notes of sour fuel and creamy cookie hit first, followed by earthy spice and a lingering kushy sweetness on the exhale. The effects start with an uplifting cerebral rush before melting into a heavy, relaxing body high that keeps you locked in but still vibing. Dense frosty buds with deep green and purple tones make this one a true NorCal pressure strain. Grown by master cultivators in our state-of-the-art indoor facility.
Flavor: Sour diesel, creamy cookie, earthy dough, gas, herbal sweetness
Effects: Euphoric, relaxing, uplifting
Dominant Terpenes: Caryophyllene, Limonene, Myrcene
